name: Norwegian Sanbakkels
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the butter until smooth.
2. Gradually add the sugar and continue beating until combined.
3. Mix in the ground almonds.
4. Add the flour and mix thoroughly to form a dough.
5. Press the dough into sanbakkel tins or roll it out very thin and cut with a cookie cutter.
6. Bake for 10 to 15 minutes at 375 F.
Note: No temperature given.
